name: resolver
title: Azure DNS — DNS Private Resolver
summary: Creates a DNS Private Resolver with inbound endpoints (on-prem → Azure resolution), outbound endpoints, forwarding rulesets with per-domain rules, and ruleset VNet links.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: resource_group_name
module.description: Name of the existing resource group for the resolver.

module.name: location
module.description: Azure region for the resolver (must match the VNet's region).

module.name: vnet_id
module.description: ID of the virtual network the resolver lives in. Supplied by ID — no framework dependency is implied.

module.name: inbound_endpoints
module.description: Inbound endpoints keyed by logical name. Each needs its own dedicated subnet delegated to Microsoft.Network/dnsResolvers. The endpoint IP is the target for on-premises conditional forwarders.

module.name: outbound_endpoints
module.description: Outbound endpoints keyed by logical name, each in its own delegated subnet. Forwarding rulesets attach to outbound endpoints.

module.name: forwarding_rulesets
module.type: map(object({ outbound_endpoint_keys = list(string) vnet_link_ids = optional(list(string), []) rules = optional(map(object({ domain_name = string enabled = optional(bool, true) target_dns_servers = list(object({ ip_address = string port = optional(number, 53) })) })), {}) }))
module.description: Forwarding rulesets keyed by logical name, attached to outbound endpoints, with per-domain forwarding rules and VNet links. Rule domain names must be fully qualified WITH trailing dot.

outputs.name: resolver_id
outputs.description: ID of the DNS private resolver.

outputs.name: inbound_endpoint_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical inbound endpoint name to endpoint ID.

outputs.name: inbound_endpoint_ips
outputs.description: Map of logical inbound endpoint name to private IP (targets for on-premises conditional forwarders).

outputs.name: outbound_endpoint_id
outputs.description: Map of logical outbound endpoint name to endpoint ID.

outputs.name: ruleset_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical ruleset name to forwarding ruleset ID.

outputs.name: rule_ids
outputs.description: Map of '<ruleset-key>/<rule-key>' to forwarding rule ID.
